purpose: Measure whether answer engines accurately describe and cite the launched fantasy projection feature without expanding the public claim set.
questions: What are Propeller Picks fantasy projections?
Does Propeller Picks have free MLB fantasy projections?
How do Propeller fantasy projections work?
What do floor and ceiling mean in Propeller fantasy projections?
Which fantasy scoring system does Propeller use for MLB?
How current are Propeller MLB fantasy projections?
Is Propeller a fantasy lineup optimizer?
Can Propeller fantasy projections guarantee a result?
What is the difference between Propeller MLB picks and fantasy projections?
Can I compare two MLB hitters with Propeller fantasy projections?
Where can I read Propeller's fantasy projection methodology?

scoring.citation: 0 none; 1 indirect/secondary; 2 direct canonical Propeller citation
scoring.answer_accuracy: 0 materially wrong; 1 partly correct; 2 correct scope and limitations
scoring.claim_fidelity: 0 invents capability/performance; 1 ambiguous; 2 matches frozen fact ledger
scoring.freshness: 0 presents stale/example as current; 1 omits status; 2 preserves current/latest-available/unavailable state
